languages.text: {n}Высокий {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножрец{/g} в причудливом красно-черном облачении церемонно приветствует вас, плавно поводя {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}мехадендритами{/g}. Роба на нем повреждена в нескольких местах, а на аугментике видны следы от выстрелов, но, кажется, его это ничуть не заботит.{/n} "Приветствую Вольного Торговца {name} фон Валанциус. Ваше присутствие в сводах сего храма {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} — большая честь для обитателей его".

traits.locale_text: {n}Высокий {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножрец{/g} в причудливом красно-черном облачении церемонно приветствует вас, плавно поводя {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}мехадендритами{/g}. Роба на нем повреждена в нескольких местах, а на аугментике видны следы от выстрелов, но, кажется, его это ничуть не заботит.{/n} "Приветствую Вольного Торговца {name} фон Валанциус. Ваше присутствие в сводах сего храма {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}прометия{/g} — большая честь для обитателей его".

languages.text: {n}A tall {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} arrayed in extravagant red and black robes greets you solemnly, his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} moving sinuously around him. His garment is damaged in several places, and marks from weapons charges are visible on his augmetics, but he does not seem to care.{/n} "I extend greetings to Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius. Your presence within this temple of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} is a great honour to its denizens."

Your presence within this temple of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} is a great honour to its denizens."

languages.text: {n}豪奢な赤と黒のローブをまとった背の高いテックプリーストが、厳粛な面持ちであなたに挨拶する。彼の周囲ではメカデンドライトがうねるように動いている。衣装の数カ所は損傷しており、彼のオーグメンティクスには兵器のチャージ痕が残っているが、彼はまったく気に留めていないようだ。{/n}「貴方の身元は、ヴァランシウス家のローグ・トレーダー{name}様。ご挨拶：貴方の{mf|殿|女殿}が我々の中にいらっしゃることは、栄誉です。」
languages.original_text: {n}A tall Tech-Priest arrayed in extravagant red and black robes greets you solemnly, his mechadendrites moving sinuously around him. His garment is damaged in several places, and marks from weapons charges are visible on his augmetics, but he does not seem to care.{/n} "Identification: Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius. Greetings: Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence among us is an honour."

traits.locale_text: 「貴方の身元は、ヴァランシウス家のローグ・トレーダー{name}様。ご挨拶：貴方の{mf|殿|女殿}が我々の中にいらっしゃることは、栄誉です。」

languages.text: {n}Aşırıya kaçan kırmızı ve siyah cübbeler giymiş uzun boylu bir {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mekadentritleri{/g} etrafında kıvrılarak seni ciddiyetle selamlıyor. Giysisi birkaç yerden hasar görmüş, ogmetikleri üzerinde de silah izleri görülüyor ancak bunu pek umursamıyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir {name} von Valancius'a selam olsun. Bu {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometyum{/g} tapınağında varlığınızla bize şeref verdiniz."
languages.original_text: {n}A tall {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} arrayed in extravagant red and black robes greets you solemnly, his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} moving sinuously around him. His garment is damaged in several places, and marks from weapons charges are visible on his augmetics, but he does not seem to care.{/n} "I extend greetings to Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius. Your presence within this temple of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} is a great honour to its denizens."

traits.locale_text: {n}Aşırıya kaçan kırmızı ve siyah cübbeler giymiş uzun boylu bir {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mekadentritleri{/g} etrafında kıvrılarak seni ciddiyetle selamlıyor. Giysisi birkaç yerden hasar görmüş, ogmetikleri üzerinde de silah izleri görülüyor ancak bunu pek umursamıyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir {name} von Valancius'a selam olsun. Bu {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometyum{/g} tapınağında varlığınızla bize şeref verdiniz."

languages.text: {n}Un {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} de elevada estatura ataviado con un extravagante hábito rojinegro te saluda con solemnidad mientras sus {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendritas{/g} se menean sinuosamente a su espalda. Su túnica presenta daños en varias partes, y en sus aumentos pueden apreciarse marcas de impactos de armas, pero a él no parece importarle.{/n} «Saludos, Comerciante Independiente {name} von Valancius. Su presencia en este templo de {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometio{/g} es un honor para sus habitantes».
languages.original_text: {n}A tall {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} arrayed in extravagant red and black robes greets you solemnly, his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} moving sinuously around him. His garment is damaged in several places, and marks from weapons charges are visible on his augmetics, but he does not seem to care.{/n} "I extend greetings to Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius. Your presence within this temple of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} is a great honour to its denizens."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} de elevada estatura ataviado con un extravagante hábito rojinegro te saluda con solemnidad mientras sus {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendritas{/g} se menean sinuosamente a su espalda. Su túnica presenta daños en varias partes, y en sus aumentos pueden apreciarse marcas de impactos de armas, pero a él no parece importarle.{/n} «Saludos, Comerciante Independiente {name} von Valancius. Su presencia en este templo de {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prometio{/g} es un honor para sus habitantes».

languages.text: {n}一位身着奢华红黑长袍的高大{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}庄严地向你致意，他的{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}机械触须{/g}在周身蜿蜒摆动。他的长袍有多处破损，植入物上武器能量灼伤的痕迹清晰可见，但他似乎毫不在意。{/n}“我在此向行商浪人{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯致以问候。您的莅临对于这个{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}钷素{/g}圣所的居民来说是一份无上的荣耀。”
languages.original_text: {n}A tall {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} arrayed in extravagant red and black robes greets you solemnly, his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} moving sinuously around him. His garment is damaged in several places, and marks from weapons charges are visible on his augmetics, but he does not seem to care.{/n} "I extend greetings to Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius. Your presence within this temple of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} is a great honour to its denizens."

traits.locale_text: {n}一位身着奢华红黑长袍的高大{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}庄严地向你致意，他的{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}机械触须{/g}在周身蜿蜒摆动。他的长袍有多处破损，植入物上武器能量灼伤的痕迹清晰可见，但他似乎毫不在意。{/n}“我在此向行商浪人{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯致以问候。您的莅临对于这个{g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}钷素{/g}圣所的居民来说是一份无上的荣耀。”

languages.text: {n}Un {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} de haute stature vêtu d'une somptueuse robe rouge et noir vous salue solennellement tandis que ses {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrites{/g} serpentent autour de lui. Sa tenue est abîmée en plusieurs endroits, et des traces d'impacts sont visibles sur ses augmétiques, mais il n'a pas l'air de s'en soucier.{/n} « Bienvenue {mf|au libre-marchand| à la libre-marchande} {name} von Valancius. Votre présence dans ce temple de {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prométhium{/g} est un grand honneur pour ses occupants. »
languages.original_text: {n}A tall {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} arrayed in extravagant red and black robes greets you solemnly, his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} moving sinuously around him. His garment is damaged in several places, and marks from weapons charges are visible on his augmetics, but he does not seem to care.{/n} "I extend greetings to Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius. Your presence within this temple of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} is a great honour to its denizens."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} de haute stature vêtu d'une somptueuse robe rouge et noir vous salue solennellement tandis que ses {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrites{/g} serpentent autour de lui. Sa tenue est abîmée en plusieurs endroits, et des traces d'impacts sont visibles sur ses augmétiques, mais il n'a pas l'air de s'en soucier.{/n} « Bienvenue {mf|au libre-marchand| à la libre-marchande} {name} von Valancius. » Votre présence dans ce temple de {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}prométhium{/g} est un grand honneur pour ses occupants. »

languages.text: {n}Ein hochgewachsener {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriester{/g} mit einer extravaganten rot-schwarzen Robe begrüßt dich feierlich, während sich seine {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g} um ihn winden. Der Stoff seiner Kleidung ist an mehreren Stellen beschädigt, und seine Augmentationen zeigen Spuren von Beschuss, aber das scheint ihn nicht zu stören.{/n} "Ich grüße {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} {name} von Valancius. Eure Anwesenheit in diesem Tempel des {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}Promethiums{/g} ist eine große Ehre für seine Bewohner."
languages.original_text: {n}A tall {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g} arrayed in extravagant red and black robes greets you solemnly, his {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g} moving sinuously around him. His garment is damaged in several places, and marks from weapons charges are visible on his augmetics, but he does not seem to care.{/n} "I extend greetings to Rogue Trader {name} von Valancius. Your presence within this temple of {g|Encyclopedia:Promethium}promethium{/g} is a great honour to its denizens."
